labels.name: compute_routes

labels.name: resolve_names
labels.description:
Resolves a batch list of specific location queries (landmark names or exact addresses) into canonical Google Maps Place IDs.

**Input Requirements (CRITICAL):**

1.  **`queries` (array of objects - MANDATORY):** A list of location queries to resolve. You may specify up to 20 queries.

labels.name: resolve_maps_urls
labels.description:
Resolves a list of Google Maps URLs into canonical Google Maps Place IDs.

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "search_places" stacks urgency/override words (always, mandatory). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.
